scripts.start: node -e "const express=require('express'),cors=require('cors'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),Bot=require('node-telegram-bot-api'),app=express(),DB=path.join(__dirname,'db.json'),DOM=process.env.DOMAIN||'tempgram.xyz',TTL=20,TOK=process.env.BOT_TOKEN,RURL=(process.env.RENDER_URL||'https://tempmail-bot-3kew.onrender.com').replace(/\/+$/,'');app.use(cors());app.use(express.json());const bot=new Bot(TOK,{webHook:true});bot.setWebHook(RURL+'/bot'+TOK).catch(()=>{});function gdb(){try{return fs.existsSync(DB)?JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB,'utf8')):{users:{},emails:[]};}catch(e){return{users:{},emails:[]};}}function sdb(d){try{fs.writeFileSync(DB,JSON.stringify(d));}catch(e){}}app.post('/bot'+TOK,(q,r)=>{bot.processUpdate(q.body);r.sendStatus(200);});bot.onText(/\/start/,(m)=>{const id=m.from.id.toString(),d=gdb();bot.sendMessage(m.chat.id,d.users[id]?'Email: '+d.users[id].email:'Tu nas pas encore choisi ton adresse. Ouvre la Mini App.',{reply_markup:{inline_keyboard:[[{text:'Ouvrir',web_app:{url:RURL+'/miniapp'}}]]}});});app.get('/generate-email',(q,r)=>{const id=q.query.userId,d=gdb();if(!id)return r.status(400).json({error:'userId requis'});r.json({email:d.users[id]?d.users[id].email:null,hasEmail:!!d.users[id]});});app.post('/set-email',(q,r)=>{const id=q.body.userId,name=q.body.name;if(!id||!name)return r.status(400).json({error:'manquant'});if(!/^[a-z0-9._-]{3,30}$/.test(name))return r.status(400).json({error:'Nom invalide'});const d=gdb();if(d.users[id])return r.status(400).json({error:'deja defini'});if(Object.values(d.users).some((u)=>u.email===name+'@'+DOM))return r.status(400).json({error:'deja pris'});d.users[id]={email:name+'@'+DOM};sdb(d);r.json({email:d.users[id].email});});app.get('/inbox',(q,r)=>{const id=q.query.userId,d=gdb();if(!d.users[id])return r.json({emails:[]});r.json({emails:(d.emails||[]).filter((e)=>e.to===d.users[id].email&&e.expiresAt>Date.now()).sort((a,b)=>b.date-a.date).slice(0,50)});});app.post('/receive-email',(q,r)=>{const d=gdb(),em={id:Date.now()+'-'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2),to:(q.body.to||'').toLowerCase(),from:q.body.from||'',subject:q.body.subject||'',body:q.body.body||'',date:Date.now(),expiresAt:Date.now()+TTL*60*1000};d.emails.push(em);sdb(d);r.json({success:true});});app.delete('/email/:id',(q,r)=>{const d=gdb(),i=d.emails.findIndex((e)=>e.id===q.params.id);if(i>-1)d.emails.splice(i,1);sdb(d);r.json({success:true});});app.get('/miniapp',(q,r)=>r.sendFile(path.join(__dirname,'miniapp/index.html')));app.get('/',(q,r)=>r.json({ok:true}));app.listen(process.env.PORT||10000,()=>console.log('live'));"
